page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v-tee.6xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed for workloads requiring dedicated compute resources and high-capacity video memory. It features an Intel Xeon 8469C processor running at 2.6 GHz with an x86_64 architecture. The system provides 24 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring consistent execution performance without resource sharing at the thread level.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, translating to 5.33 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, it includes a single GPU with 96 GB of total VRAM, making it highly suitable for memory-intensive graphical or parallel computing tasks. Local storage is not bundled with this instance, meaning external block storage must be attached for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 15 Gbps.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and large 96 GB VRAM GPU profile represent a specialized hardware class optimized for resource-dense parallel processing rather than general-purpose utility. This configuration is well-suited for workloads such as machine learning inference, data science jobs, and GPU-accelerated rendering where dedicated CPU execution and massive video memory are critical.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v-tee.6xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance built on the x86_64 architecture. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8469C processor running at 2.6 GHz, it delivers 24 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core. The hardware configuration includes 128.0 GB of system memory and a single GPU equipped with 96 GB of VRAM, providing substantial capacity for parallel computing tasks. This instance does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage for data persistence. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 15 Gbps. The combination of dedicated CPU resources and a high-VRAM GPU makes this server highly efficient for workloads such as machine learning inference, data science, and complex rendering tasks.
